meaning: Reserve Officers' Training Corps (美国)后备军官训练队
examples: Later, he received a call from the ROTC offering him a job at the University of New Mexico.
So by the second week of March 1970, I knew I was free of the ROTC obligation, but not the draft.
In any case, I still considered myself bound to the ROTC commitment if Colonel Holmes called me on it.
Representative CLIFF STEARNS (Republican, Florida): 'Cause I know the importance of ROTC in the armed forces.
His younger brother is in the Navy ROTC and wants to serve on a nuclear submarine.
